content:
📢 Biostatistics Training Programme for Oncology Researchers
Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Centre, Muzaffarpur in collaboration with StatsCure Network | Biostatistics & Research Support Services proudly presents a training initiative to strengthen Biostatistics and Research Methodology skills for oncology researchers.

📅 Every 15 Days, Upcoming Session: 4th July 2026
⏳ 90 Minutes Expert Session
🎓 E-Certificate for Participants

Enhancing research skills for better evidence-based cancer care.
Link for registration: https://lnkd.in/dY-EjaVf

Dr Kumar Prabhash
Ankush Shetake, Ashish Pawar
Tata Memorial Centre
Department of Atomic Energy (DAE), Government of India | परमाणु ऊर्जा विभाग
